message:
style: apply rustfmt adjustments to line wrapping and blank lines

Reformat method-chain breaks to split at the dot-call rather than at
the assignment, collapse short function calls to single lines, remove
a stray blank line in session_store_v2, and rewrap a long binding in
agent.rs. No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
